steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The goal is to find $6y$. Adding the two equations eliminates $x$: $$(3x + 6y) + (-3x - 4y) = 17 + 5$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $22$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $22$ is the value to enter.
